candidate_summary: Open-source Stable Diffusion web UI; a dominant local generative-AI tool, measured by sustained GitHub adoption.
observed_outcome_summary: Created 2022-08-22; as of 2026-05-31 the repo has 163,371 stars and 30,369 forks (live GitHub REST API). Forks = stronger revealed developer action (cloning to run/build); stars = lighter interest. Sustained open-source adoption in the developer market.
raw_outcome_evidence: GitHub REST API api.github.com/repos/AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui (operator-fetched 2026-05-31): stargazers_count=163371, forks_count=30369, created_at=2022-08-22T14:05:26Z.

action_signal_candidates.notes: 30,369 forks (live API). Tier-1 revealed developer action (clone to build/run).

reviewer_notes: Recommended evidence_tier=1 (forks) + Tier-2 (stars). Adds open-source AI/dev-tool diversity. Counts are CUMULATIVE with no time-decay and no denominator of all developers reached. Recommended designation: TRAINING (or pending if a time-boxed snapshot is preferred).
uncertainty_flags: self_selected_denominator: backers/users are self-selected; the receptive/uncertain/skeptical proportions of the FULL addressable market are NOT externally observable
buyer_numerator_only: the action signal gives the buyer/action-positive count, not a four-bucket distribution
cumulative_no_denominator: stars/forks are cumulative; there is no denominator of all developers who saw the repo and passed
snapshot_count: counts change over time; this is a 2026-05-31 snapshot
